name: setadd-evident
note: S-SETADD-EVIDENT (operator UAT 2026-07-12: 'some rows not showing the plus... feels like something is broken'): library rows WITHOUT a chord sheet (seq-less jam/video tracks) render a GHOST + in the add slot - dashed, faint, aria-labeled with the reason - and tapping it shows an explaining toast with the fix path (edit + add a progression). Rows WITH chords keep the live +. The add slot always communicates; an empty slot never ships.

steps.label: library renders both live + and ghost + rows (catalog has songs AND seq-less jam tracks)
every ghost + carries the stated reason as aria-label
ghost is visually distinct: dashed border + reduced opacity vs the live +
tapping the ghost explains itself: toast names the missing chords + the fix path
the ghost tap did NOT add anything to the setlist
